message:
fix(cli,bd-v3of1): cass models install/remove honor every registered embedder

Pre-fix: src/lib.rs run_models_install (line 26978) and run_models_remove
(line 27740) hardcoded `if model_name != "all-minilm-l6-v2" { return Err }`
with comment "Only support the default model for now". This rejected the
two other registered embedders (snowflake-arctic-s, nomic-embed) even though:
- src/search/embedder_registry.rs already registers all 3
- src/search/model_download.rs:738 ModelManifest::for_embedder() already
  returns manifests for all 3
- src/search/fastembed_embedder.rs:120 FastEmbedder::model_dir_for()
  already maps all 3 to their dirs
- src/daemon/worker.rs (commit cf85b403) was patched to honor these models

Net effect of the gap: daemon would accept embedding jobs for
snowflake-arctic-s/nomic-embed but `cass models install --model
snowflake-arctic-s` failed with "Unknown model 'snowflake-arctic-s'.
Only 'all-minilm-l6-v2' is supported."

Post-fix:
- New helper resolve_cli_model_name(model_name) maps every alias the
  daemon worker honors (minilm, minilm-384, all-minilm-l6-v2, fastembed,
  snowflake-arctic-s, snowflake-arctic-s-384, snowflake-arctic-embed-s,
  nomic-embed, nomic-embed-768, nomic-embed-text-v1.5; case-insensitive)
  to the canonical registry name, mirroring daemon::worker::resolve_embedder_kind
  exactly so the two surfaces cannot drift.
- run_models_install resolves the manifest via ModelManifest::for_embedder
  and the install dir via FastEmbedder::model_dir_for, so the download
  pipeline now uses the right manifest + dir per requested model.
- run_models_remove resolves the dir the same way.
- Unknown models now error with code=20 + a helpful list of all 3
  supported names instead of "Only 'all-minilm-l6-v2' is supported."

Tests added (src/lib.rs cli_models_resolution_tests):
1. resolve_cli_model_name_accepts_every_registered_embedder_alias —
   13 (alias, canonical) pairs covering all aliases the daemon worker
   honors, including case-insensitive variants.
2. resolve_cli_model_name_rejects_unknown_with_useful_hint — pins
   code=20, kind="model", message lists all 3 supported, hint points
   at `cass models status`.
3. every_resolved_canonical_name_has_manifest_and_dir_mapping — pins
   the cross-module contract: every canonical name returned MUST be
   accepted by both ModelManifest::for_embedder and
   FastEmbedder::model_dir_for. Catches drift if either registry
   adds/removes embedders without updating the other.

Out of scope (filed as follow-up considerations in v3of1):
- check_model_installed (src/search/model_download.rs:1747) is still
  hardcoded to ModelManifest::minilm_v2(). For non-minilm models it
  always returns NotInstalled, so install always proceeds even if the
  model is already on disk. Worst-case UX is "install confirms
  download for already-installed snowflake/nomic"; correctness is
  preserved (the downloader skips already-correct files).

Validation: rch test passed for all 3 new tests (75s, exit=0,
3 passed / 0 failed / 4093 filtered out).

Closes coding_agent_session_search-v3of1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
